projectPrefix.description: The prefix for Docker container names (e.g. 'myapp')

surfaces.description: JSON array of surface specs from the surface registry (.groundwork/surfaces.json): [{"slug": "web-app", "medium": "playwright", "reach": "..."}]. 'medium' is the registry's testMedium (playwright | subprocess-cli | protocol-client | others register without a runner fixture); 'reach' is an optional static base URL (playwright/protocol-client) or launch command (subprocess-cli) — omitted, URL mediums are discovered from docker-compose.yml by slug. Generates the slug-keyed 'surfaces' fixture plus one runner fixture per surface. Supersedes interfaceMedium when both are given.

interfaceMedium.description: DEPRECATED single-surface alias for 'surfaces' — the project's interface medium, from docs/design-system.md's interface track. Used only when no surface registry exists; generates the legacy frontend_base_url fixture instead of the surfaces map
